rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (GraphClarifyKG), shows where the draft drifts from it (treating clarifying-question selection as flat text ranking and discarding the entity structure of the underlying KG), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims by removing overclaims about novelty, conversational state conditioning, and attribution.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with no regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaims about novelty, conversational state conditioning, and attribution) and avoids them.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
